title: skills:skill-repository-infra
description: Infrastructure implementation of `SkillRepositoryPort` using node:fs for file system operations.
context: Infrastructure implementation of `SkillRepositoryPort` using node:fs for file system operations.

rules: The infrastructure MUST use `node:fs/promises` to read template files from `packages/skills/templates/skills/` and `packages/skills/templates/agents/`.

A `TemplateReader` component MUST read `.md.tpl` files from `packages/skills/templates/skills/<name>/` or `packages/skills/templates/agents/<name>/` and return them as `SkillTemplate` objects with lazy content loading.
The module MUST export `createSkillRepository(): SkillRepositoryPort` as the main factory function.

constraints: All I/O happens in this infrastructure layer.

scenarios.name: Reads template files from skills and agents subfolders
when: getBundle is called for a skill or an agent
then: it reads from packages/skills/templates/skills/ or packages/skills/templates/agents/ respectively

scenarios.name: TemplateReader loads .md.tpl files from categorized subfolders
then: the TemplateReader correctly resolves paths under skills/ or agents/
